title: Ms. Meifang Zhang, Deputy Consul General, the Consulate General of the People's Republic of China
description: Ms. Meifang Zhang, Deputy Consul General, the Consulate General of the People's Republic of China in New York, address to the Schiller Institute's conference, "U.S.-China Cooperation on the Belt & Road Initiative," exploring the corresponding ideas in Chinese and Western thought., April 13-14, 2017.
